transcript: Super. Um... I was looking for that... um... that R&B single.
The R&B single, it's like: "Trip, triple check check, double check, triple check, check, triple double check. Trip, triple double..."
[laughing] You don't know what it's called?

"Triple double check check. Triple double double check. [echoing] Triple triple check. Double double triple check. Check check. Triple double double triple check. Triple double double check. Double double." It's like that.
I think it's by Otis King.
Okay, hold on just a sec.

And it's like, it's like, "Triple double flip flimma comma double chip. Double chip, double trip, triple triple chip." [looped, wavering pitch, echoing] It's like, it's like, "Triple double flip flimma comma double chip. Double chip, double trip, triple triple chip." [scramble] "Triple double flip flimma comma double--" So I was wondering how late you're open to?
["Triple triple chip" and "It's like, it's like..." echo]
Yeah, how late you're... how late you're open?
Do you want me to check on that album for you?
[heavy echo] Uhh... do you have anything by Dugan... Nash?
Can I ask you what you're speaking through?
Yeah, hello. I've got some kinda... some kind of interference.
Okay, yeah, we can barely hear you.
Okay, now I'm talkin' about Dugan... Nash.
Okay... can you spell the first name?
Okay, I can barely hear you. Is there any way you can...
Uh, we're getting really weird interf... interference. I can... n...
...not understand barely anything you're saying to me.
Okay, can you spell Dugan please?
And they do that one song that's like, uh... "Double flip, Double triple flip, flip. Trouble check. Triple flip... [echoing] ...double double triple flip. Double flip, double triple. Double flip..."
Okay, I really, I... I got... I... I...
[repeating, low-pitched] And they do that one song that's like, uh... Double--
Dugan Nash... um, it's not in our syst--
[repeating, low-pitched] And they do that one song that's like, uh... Double--
Okay, I... I'm sorry, I'm not trying to be rude, but I mean...
...I'm getting this really weird inter... in... interference, and I can barely understand what you're saying, and it keeps cutting off in the middle of when you're talking to me.
Okay. Let's try again. Dugan... Nasssshh.
Okay, I already... I... no, I... I already... I already looked up Dugan Nash. But, umm...
[repeating, slightly higher pitch] Okay. Let's try again. Dugan... Nasssshh.
Okay, I j... I just looked it up, and I'm not seeing anything in our system by Dugan Nash.
Yeah. [high-pitched, looped] How about Orville Sasshhhh? How about Orvill--
Okay. I'm getting, like, feedback... uh, your voice is echoing... umm...
I don't understand. I really don't.
And I'm not trying to, you know... poke fun at anything.
Yes, I looked up Orville Nash, and I could not find it.
Nash! [pitch-shifted echo] Nash! Nash! Nash! Nash! Nash!
